sentence: go to demoqa.com/select-menu and choose 'Group 2, option 1' from the multi-level select menu

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Select Menu Page, Open Dropdown
workflow.description: Locate the 'Select One' multi-level select menu and open it.
triggers: If the current URL contains demoqa.com/select-menu
If a div with placeholder text 'Select Option' is visible
actions: Click the div with placeholder text 'Select Option'

workflow.name: Dropdown Options Visible, Select Target
workflow.description: Select 'Group 2, option 1' from the opened dropdown list.
triggers: If the current URL contains demoqa.com/select-menu
If an option labeled 'Group 2, option 1' is visible in a dropdown list

workflow.name: Option Selected And Confirmed
workflow.description: Verify that 'Group 2, option 1' has been successfully selected.
triggers: If the current URL contains demoqa.com/select-menu
If a div with text 'Group 2, option 1' is visible as the selected value in the 'Select Option' dropdown
